name: Best Beans
recipeIngredient: 2 1 lb cans french style green beans, drained
1 can french fried onion rings (3 ounce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the beans.
2. Place in a 2-quart casserole.
3. Stir in the soup, green chiles, cheese, salt, and pepper.
4. Cover with plastic wrap.
5. Microwave at high (100%) until hot and bubbly, about 6 to 8 minutes.
6. Sprinkle with onion rings.
7. Continue microwaving at high (100%) until onion rings are heated, about 1 to 2 minutes.
Makes 6 servings.
